CREATE TABLE xml_entity_test (id INT PRIMARY KEY, xml_data XML, sql_value VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO xml_entity_test (id, xml_data) VALUES (1, '<entity><value>Test String</value></entity>');
SELECT sql_value FROM xml_entity_test WHERE id = 1 AND soap_box_xml_entity(xml_data, 'VARCHAR') = 'Test String';
SELECT sql_value FROM xml_entity_test WHERE id = 2 AND soap_box_xml_entity(xml_data, 'INTEGER') = 12345;
SELECT sql_value FROM xml_entity_test WHERE id = 3 AND soap_box_xml_entity(xml_data, 'DATE') = '2023-10-01';
CREATE TABLE other_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, reference_id INT);
SELECT o.id, soap_box_xml_entity(t.xml_data, 'VARCHAR') AS converted_value FROM xml_entity_test t JOIN other_table o ON t.id = o.reference_id;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM xml_entity_test WHERE soap_box_xml_entity(xml_data, 'VARCHAR') IS NOT NULL;
SELECT DISTINCT soap_box_xml_entity(xml_data, 'VARCHAR') FROM xml_entity_test WHERE sql_value LIKE 'Test%';
UPDATE xml_entity_test SET sql_value = soap_box_xml_entity(xml_data, 'VARCHAR') WHERE id = 1;
DELETE FROM xml_entity_test WHERE soap_box_xml_entity(xml_data, 'VARCHAR') = 'Test String';
